text: My surgeon is bringing in a general surgeon as she believes that even though my MRI didn’t show endo in my rectum and bowels and bladder, they believe it still might be there. I’m so glad they’re being proactive.
just had my endometrioma removed after 8 years of being told it's in my head ,🎉

MRI show stage 3 endo laparoscopy show 0 still in horrendous pain living on nerve blockers and morphine nothing touching the pain still have flairs bladder bowel pelvic pain , I’m adamant I’ve got endo I’ll not stop until I have answers

I had transvaginal scan that showed I have a cyst, fibroids and the wall thickening she even asked if I have severe periods because the scarring was that bad and she was shocked when I said I've not had one in over 15 yrs yet the gynecologist still won't see me

Had an internal and external scan and it was normal, had my laparoscopy on Friday and they found stage 3 endo on my bladder, bowel, ovaries and wall lining, 16 years of fighting, I’m finally validated
